archetype: ARCHETYPE 5 (Jewel & Luxury) blended with ARCHETYPE 1 (Organic & Earthy)
vibe: High-end artisanal, expensive, tactile, and elegant.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a luxury e-commerce experience for 'ArtemCreations', a brand of handmade crochet handbags. Do not use generic SaaS layouts. The UI must feel like a high-end fashion magazine (Vogue/Celine vibes). Prioritize massive negative space, elegant typography pairings (large serifs mixed with tiny, tracked-out sans-serif labels), and asymmetrical or bento-style layouts for product showcases. Never use pure black or pure white; always use the specified stone and charcoal tones. Implement smooth scroll with Framer Motion fade-ins.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-primary-text
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight text-primary-text
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-secondary-text

typography.rules: Headings must never be 'Inter' or bold. Use font-light or font-normal for Cormorant Garamond. Labels and overlines must be wide-tracked uppercase.

spacing_and_layout.rules: Avoid center-aligning everything. Use left-alignment for body and dense content to create a strong vertical axis. Give products breathing room (padding within cards).

surfaces_and_borders.header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/80 border-b border-[#2D2D2D]/10
surfaces_and_borders.cards: bg-transparent border border-transparent hover:border-[#2D2D2D]/10 transition-colors duration-500
surfaces_and_borders.buttons_primary: bg-[#2D2D2D] text-[#F9F8F6] hover:bg-[#9E4723] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4
surfaces_and_borders.buttons_secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2D2D2D] text-[#2D2D2D] hover:bg-[#2D2D2D] hover:text-[#F9F8F6] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4

motion_and_interaction.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion to fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> 1) with ease-out duration 0.8s.
motion_and_interaction.button_hover: Add a subtle arrow slide-in effect or background color crossfade.

components_strategy.navigation: Minimalist. Logo centered in H1/Serif font. Links left and right. Cart icon on far right. Glassmorphism effect on scroll.
components_strategy.hero: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Large editorial image with overlay gradient 'bg-black/20'. Overlay text should be bottom-left aligned, huge serif typography.
components_strategy.product_card: Minimal. No card background. Just the image (aspect ratio 3:4 or 4:5), title in serif below, price in sans-serif. 'Add to cart' appears on hover over image.
components_strategy.about_section: Split layout. 50% image, 50% text. High padding.
components_strategy.shadcn: Use Shadcn for Carousel, Sheet (mobile menu), and Select (filters). Override default Vercel-look borders and radii (set everything to rounded-none).

hero.description: Woman with a purse on a sandy beach - elegant lifestyle shot
Pink and white crocheted bag close-up

products.description: Bag sitting on a wooden floor
Trendy senior posing with colorful crochet bag

craftsmanship_and_about.description: Abstract geometric pattern of textured brown material for subtle backgrounds

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has subtle dark overlay gradient to maintain contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Every interactive button and link must have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').
